Gulf countries we will support:
•	UAE: United Arab Emirates
•	SA: Saudi Arabia 
•	OM: Oman
•	KW: Kuwait
•	QA: Qatar
•	Bahrain
For both countries below, WOs (onsite+ CRU) can be created in MSD:
•	UAE
•	Saudi Arabia (Riyadh, Khobar and Dammam only)

For the rest of Gulf countries:
•	Kuwait
•	Bahrain
•	Qatar
•	Oman
•	Other cities of Saudi Arabia.

For Base Warranty Upgrade:
We will handle the case without checking if it was created by the end customer or an ASP. Only CRU parts can be sent. For any onsite SSR, we must contact the CSM, Diana (Diana.Rimpapova@ibm.com), to get OVD approval.

For 24/7 warranty:
We will check If the case was created by the end customer or ASP. 
•	Created by end customer >> we will ask the customer to contact the local ASP, and we will cancel the case. 
•	Created by the ASP >> we will handle it (only CRU WO only that can be created, even if the part is Tier 2, No onsite WO can be created "the ASP has its own engineers to replace the parts").

For base warranty (Limited warranty 9/5):
•	Created by the end customer >> we will ask him to contact the local ASP, and we will cancel the case. 
•	Created by ASP >> we ask them to contact Lenovo’s ASP support (available 9x5 UK business hours): aspsupport@lenovo.com. Then cancel the case. 


How to know if it's end customer or ASP:
Check the link below, select the country and the city, you will get all the ASPs of this country:
https://support.lenovo.com/ae/en/lenovo-service-provider/




For Storage support:
•	If the machine has a base warranty upgrade, we will handle the case without checking if it was created by the end customer or an ASP. (Only CRU parts can be sent. For any onsite SSR, we must contact the CSM, Diana (Diana.Rimpapova@ibm.com), to get OVD approval.)

For other Warranties:
•	End Customer who created the case >> case created for IBM presence country >> We will handle the case
•	End Customer who created the case >> case created for Non-IBM presence country >> Ask him to contact the local ASP.
•	ASP who created the case >> will handle the case for both IBM presence countries and Non-IBM presence countries
•	For Non-IBM presence country >> CRU WO only can be created, even if the part is Tier 2 part (the ASP has their own engineers to replace the parts).
•	For IBM presence country >> Onsite and CRU WO can be created in MSD.

The customer will provide the FRU of the parts he needs.
We will only order the FRU of the parts as CRU.
 No AP will be provided to this customer.
We identify it by the emails, not the Company name.

For Call Home cases only, no action needed, we just CC them, cand change the status to OnHold,  till SAP Operations team activates them.
It is not required to inform the client regarding that ticket.
When SAP team activate them, they will send us an email, or notify us by outlook, or add a note in the MSD case.
When you get asked to activate the ticket, please enter the SAP ticket number manually into the, External Ref # in the MSD case.
If the case is not activated within 14 days, It will be cancelled.
For normal cases (non Call Home), they will be handled normally.
There is a media retention in place for all storage media (SSD, HDD, SD-Card, etc.)

No Onsite WO will be created outside Nairobi.
If a customer requests an onsite visit for any city outside Nairobi, Do not create the WO, and just notify Narges, so she will contact the CSM to request an approval.

• Inform the customers they have to contact the local ASP. Provide the following link to them:
https://datacentersupport.lenovo.com/de/de/lenovo-service-provider
• In case an ASP opened the ticket and they are looking for support from higher support levels, direct them to Lenovo's ASP support (available 9x5 UK business hours): aspsupport@lenovo.com
• CANCEL the ticket in Mahi.
• SBD cases will be handled normally with ESWAT team.

Template:

Dear All,

Kindly be informed that this case needs to be re-opened with your Lenovo ASP, as the contract for SN XXXX  is IOL Basic warranty with Next Business Day response. 

Please contact them directly to get support. Kindly find the link below:
https://support.lenovo.com/ae/en/lenovo-service-provider/

Kindly note that this case will be cancelled.

- Once an ONS MSD WO is submitted, the Control Center team will assign it in CSP to MIBB. In this case MIBB will be a vendor for IBM for the Lenovo ISG onsite support.
- If you need to contact the MIBB team (in case logs requested but not uploaded, or any more information are requested from their SSR during the intervention), please send an email to MIBB team support@mibbint.com and add CC team MENARRC@eg.ibm.com in CC.

processes.issue: No PUDO in AUE or SA
processes.process:
The parts should be sent to the SSRs or IBM presenceTo know the address, you can contact CC team TSS@eg.ibm.com
After creating the WO for SA or UAE, please include TSS@eg.ibm.com in the email with the customer, they will contact the engineer to arrange the visit.

Make sure always to add the below emails in any cases related to Bank Alfalah - PK:

khalid.ishaq@bankalfalah.com
adeel.akhtar@bankalfalah.com
khalid.ishaq@bankalfalah.com
syed.hassam@bankalfalah.com

Control center team (RMC):
control-center-pk@ibm.com
https://ibm.enterprise.slack.com/archives/CR2PR3KTP

For any WO in SA, we are required to request the National Address.

Shipments within SA without a valid National Address format will no longer be accepted, UPS will reject shipments that do not include the required address format.

The short address code must be included along with the full National Address; it will be added in Address Line 3 in the WO.

Customers in SA are aware of this process. If any customer is unable to provide their National Address, please ask them to register using the link below to obtain it:
https://splonline.com.sa/en/national-address-1/

The part should be sent to the SSR location, no parts can be sent to the customer.
Action plan should include the following information
Mahi case number
Mahi WO number
Client Ticket number (RITM)
System location

Once WO is created, please provide the customer with the info below:
ETA of the part
MSD Case number
MSD WO number
number of packets
FRU number + Part Description
Carrier + Tracking number

Once the WO is created, please involve TSS@eg.ibm.com in the emails with the customer, as the SSR needs to provide some info to arrange the access.

We do not request logs and we do not provide any AP.

We only order the requested FRU as CRU only.
Do not send a survey for these cases.
